Method provenance block:

Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (exact four-center integrals; density fitting OFF).
Geometry provenance: user-supplied /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz; single-point charges at this fixed geometry (no re-optimization).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no continuum model).
Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet (0, 1); cation doublet ( +1, 2); anion doublet ( –1, 2).
Software: PySCF via chemkit fukui subcommand.
Convergence & warnings: SCF converged for all three charge states. The engine flagged three warnings (verbatim below). Integrity status: ok, trustworthy = true.
Live log: the run streamed to a chemkit fukui .out file in the current directory (e.g. fukui_<timestamp>.out); it can be inspected or tailed for the full SCF transcript.

• Most electrophilic site (largest f⁺): atom 1 (N) f⁺ = 0.48422572
• Most nucleophilic site (largest f⁻): atom 4 (C) f⁻ = 0.11826260
• Dual descriptor highlights N as the dominant electrophilic center (Δ = 0.4201).
